issues.description: No migration correctness defect found: migration.sql:16/19 adds isShared and GeneratedAsset_isShared_status_type_idx with the schema-matching column order; schema.prisma:10 uses postgresql and migration_lock.toml:1 matches; git ls-files shows the ignored migration files are tracked. However read-only/process restrictions prevented full gate completion: prisma validate and npm run build fail at Prisma temp mkdir EPERM, and vitest fails at Vite/esbuild spawn EPERM. tsc --noEmit passed; npm run lint exited 0 with one unrelated warning at src/features/space/livekit/internal/LiveKitMediaContext.tsx:578.
issues.recommendation: Run prisma validate, vitest, and build once in a writable/non-restricted environment before merging or applying prod migrations.
issues.deferRationale: The remaining risk is verification-environment related, not a file-level defect in the WI-016 migration. Full Prisma replay/drift proof still requires the shadow DB path noted in the WI.
